title: Donut Elytra
description: A texture pack that replaces the Elytra with colorful donut-themed wings, adding a playful and eye-catching twist to your Minecraft adventures.
body:
This texture pack transforms the Elytra into a bold donut-inspired design, covering the wings with bright blue and pink frosted donuts arranged across the surface.

Perfect for players who enjoy colorful, or food-themed cosmetics while keeping the classic Minecraft feel.

![Elytra on the beach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3e4c5b828e0cae461cfa8642bb10dab61899960_0.webp)
